## 🌀 Claiming / Pitching Your App
Tell us what useless app you want to build! You are free to design and build absolutely anything as long as it's creative and useless.

*   **App Name / Slug:** `<e.g., my-crazy-cursor>`
*   **Brief Description:** `<What does it do? (e.g., A cursor that gets larger the longer you wait)>`
*   **Assigned to:** @username

## 🚀 How to build it
1. Follow the guidelines in the [Contributing Guide](https://github.com/khorshedcodes/theuselessweb.wtf/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).
2. Create your folder under `public/submissions/<your-slug>/`.
3. Fill it with `index.html`, `style.css`, and `app.js`.
4. Register it in `src/data/registry.json`.
5. Run `npm run build` locally to make sure it passes check tests, then submit a PR!
